message:
chore(deploy): ignore screenshot directories in Vercel deploy

Add screenshots/ and docs/images/ to .vercelignore to prevent
upload errors from large local screenshot files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,13 @@ packages/web/test-results/
 packages/web/screenshots/
 test-results/
 
+# Screenshot directories (local capture, not needed for deploy)
+screenshots/
+/screenshots/
+
+# Documentation images (referenced by README but served from GitHub, not Vercel)
+docs/images/
+
 # Local repro scripts / scratch assets
 repro_*.ts
 test-*.ts
